programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell sets out on a journey to discover how six of Britain's most stunning bridges were designed and built. Completed in 1890, the Forth Rail Bridge now carries around 200 trains every day. The last of the great Victorian engineering triumphs, it has grown to symbolise Scotland as much as Edinburgh Castle, bagpipes or kilts. But, as Rob learns, this incredible engineering achievement was born from the tragedy of the 1879 Tay Bridge disaster, and 73 deaths were connected with its construction and immediate aftermath(n)

programme.title: Tony Robinson: Coast to Coast
programme.desc: The actor explores the Yorkshire Dales and in the town of Hawes, meets the team who came together to save local production of Wensleydale cheese by organising a management buy-out of the creamery after the parent company closed it down. Tony also visits the market town of Leyburn on calf auction day, before heading to Aysgarth Falls, a triple flight of waterfalls carved out of the River Ure. In the Swaledale valley, Tony joins in rehearsals of the Muker Silver Band, discovering the origins of this traditional brass outfit(n)

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: The return of the behind-the-scenes look at the North York Moors Railway. Piglet's been promoted, but seems to spend more time in his overalls than behind his desk as he grapples with an old American war-horse, the S160 Omaha. Elsewhere on the railway, lovable ticket inspector Bert Blower has a new trainee, and 'king of the carriages' Kieran awaits a Flying Scotsman carriage returning to the railway after being vandalised two years earlier. Plus, there are antics from trainee driver Phil and budget-conscious big boss Chris(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Britain by Barge: Then & Now
programme.desc: Travelling along the Leeds and Liverpool canal, Bill Oddie, Jennie Bond, Anne Diamond and Pete Waterman eventually leave Yorkshire behind them and head into Lancashire. Pete and Anne discover a Polish war memorial and learn about the role canals played in the Second World War. Bill goes in search of an elusive kingfisher, while Jennie walks in Charlotte Brontë's footsteps. Later, Anne samples a Fat Rascal, Pete tries to turn Bill into a steam engine nut and the entire quartet disappear into the dripping darkness of Foulridge Tunnel, where they find out about a famous cow who once swam it(n)

programme.title: The Comeback of Ant McPartlin
programme.desc: Documentary examining the presenter's fall from grace in 2018, when while his marriage to Lisa Armstrong was failing, he was charged with drink-driving and admitted to rehab for a second time. Through interviews with experts, the programme offers an insight into how Ant's world collapsed around him and how it feels to have personal problems played out in front of the nation. It also speculates as to whether Ant will successfully complete his recovery when he rejoins Declan Donnelly for the latest series of Britain's Got Talent(n)

programme.title: Basic Instinct (1992)
programme.desc: A hard-drinking San Francisco cop investigates the case of a man murdered with an ice-pick, but his normally well-honed intuition starts letting him down as he falls for the sultry and manipulative chief suspect, the victim's former girlfriend. Thriller from director Paul Verhoeven, starring Sharon Stone, Michael Douglas, George Dzundza and Jeanne Tripplehorn(n)

programme.title: Donovan's Reef (1963)
programme.desc: An American soldier settles down with a friend and a kindly doctor on a South Sea island to relax in the aftermath of the Second World War. The arrival of the medic's snobbish daughter throws their idyllic life into turmoil, leaving them struggling to make her father seem respectable. Comedy drama directed by John Ford, starring John Wayne, Lee Marvin, Jack Warden, Elizabeth Allen and Cesar Romero(n)

programme.title: The Comancheros (1961)
programme.desc: A hard-bitten Texas Ranger joins forces with a convict and a gambler in a covert operation to run a gang of gunmen out of the territory for supplying Comanche warriors with arms and alcohol from a secret hideout in Mexico. But after infiltrating the renegades' secret camp, they have to figure out how to survive until help arrives. Western, with John Wayne, Stuart Whitman, Ina Balin, Nehemiah Persoff and Lee Marvin(n)

programme.title: Hatari! (1962)
programme.desc: A group of reckless animal trappers travels through the wilds of Africa, but the arrival of a beautiful photographer looks set to cause upheaval among the group. Comedy adventure, starring John Wayne, Red Buttons, Hardy Kruger, Elsa Martinelli and Michele Girardon(n)

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron(n)

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel (2017)
programme.desc: Having sworn revenge against his relative's widow, a young Englishman finds his plans soon change after they finally meet. Drama based on the Daphne Du Maurier novel, starring Rachel Weisz, Sam Claflin and Holliday Grainger(n)

programme.title: The Boy (2016)
programme.desc: A nanny is hired by a couple in a remote English village, only to discover she is not looking after a child but a life-size model, whom her employers treat like a real boy as a way of coping with the loss of their son 20 years previously. When she breaks a series of rules she has been given, the nanny experiences a series of disturbing events and starts to suspect the model boy is somehow alive. Horror, starring Lauren Cohan and Rupert Evans(n)

programme.title: With or Without You (1999)
programme.desc: A couple who have been together for years find their idyllic relationship put under pressure when the wife's former pen-pal arrives on the scene - and looks set to throw a spanner in the works. Romantic drama, starring Christopher Eccleston, Dervla Kirwan and Yvan Attal(n)

programme.title: Fair Wind to Java (1953)
programme.desc: A sailor races to reach a hoard of diamonds stowed on board a Dutch vessel that has sunk in the East Indies. However, the derelict ship lies close to an island inhabited by a fierce tribe with a deep mistrust of strangers, while a volcano is about to erupt at any moment. Seafaring adventure, with Fred MacMurray, Vera Ralston and Robert Douglas(n)

programme.title: A Day to Remember (1953)
programme.desc: The members of the darts team from the Hand & Flower pub in London head off on a day trip to Boulogne. Among the group is Jim, who is worried that his girlfriend plans to leave him, Shorty, a loner who hopes to join the Foreign Legion, the woman-chasing Charley, and Stan, an entrepreneur who wants to smuggle black-market watches back to the UK. Comedy, starring Stanley Holloway, Donald Sinden and Joan Rice(n)

programme.title: The Riddle of the Sands (1979)
programme.desc: An English yachtsman sailing round the coast of Germany in 1901 encounters a naval officer who has betrayed his country. Enlisting the aid of a friend, he discovers a plan by Kaiser Wilhelm to invade Britain - which they are the only ones in a position to stop. Spy thriller, starring Simon MacCorkindale, Michael York and Jenny Agutter(n)

programme.title: The Last Wagon (1956)
programme.desc: A mixed-race renegade is convicted for the murder of his wife's killers and transported to prison in a wagon train. When the party is attacked by Apaches, the only survivors are the prisoner and a group of orphaned children, so he takes responsibility for leading them to safety. Western, with Richard Widmark, Felicia Farr, Ray Stricklyn and Susan Kohner(n)

programme.title: Dante's Peak (1997)
programme.desc: A vulcanologist's suspicions that a long-dormant volcano is about to erupt turn out to be true, prompting him to race against time to save the community standing in its way - and clash with local government officials weighing his predictions against the loss in tourism revenue. Disaster movie, starring Pierce Brosnan, Linda Hamilton, Elizabeth Hoffman and Charles Hallahan(n)

programme.title: X-Men: Apocalypse (2016)
programme.desc: The mutant heroes face the oldest and most powerful of their kind, an ancient Egyptian tyrant who is restored to life in the 1980s and plans to destroy civilisation and rebuild it in his own image. Superhero adventure sequel, starring James McAvoy, Michael Fassbender, Jennifer Lawrence and Oscar Isaac(n)

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: A man moves into a new house along with his wife, daughter and younger brother, and finds an old camcorder and a box of videotapes. The siblings start watching the tapes, which turn out to be home movies shot by the property's previous owners, but by doing so, they unleash evil spirits into the world. Horror sequel, starring Chris J Murray and Brit Shaw(n)

programme.title: 24 Hour Party People (2002)
programme.desc: Biopic of Tony Wilson, journalist, founder of Factory Records and the Hacienda nightclub and the man credited with breathing new life into Manchester's music scene, introducing the world to bands including Joy Division, New Order and Happy Mondays. Starring Steve Coogan, John Simm, Ralf Little, Andy Serkis and Shirley Henderson(n)

programme.title: The Killing (1956)
programme.desc: An ex-convict assembles a motley crew of crooks and no-hopers to pull off an elaborate robbery at a heavily guarded racetrack. Stanley Kubrick's noir thriller, starring Sterling Hayden, Coleen Gray, Vince Edwards, Jay C Flippen and Timothy Carey(n)

programme.title: Sink the Bismarck! (1960)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama, charting the mission to track down and eliminate the pride of the German fleet, a fearsome battleship devastating British vessels in the North Atlantic, orchestrated by a British naval officer recovering from his wife's death in an air raid. Starring Kenneth More, Dana Wynter, Laurence Naismith and Karel Stepanek(n)

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin(n)

programme.title: This Happy Breed (1944)
programme.desc: A working-class family moves into a new suburban home after the father returns from service in the First World War. However, the couple and their children struggle to adjust to life higher up the social ladder. David Lean's drama, adapted by Noel Coward from his play, starring Robert Newton, Celia Johnson, Robert Stanley Holloway and John Mills(n)

programme.title: Back to the Future (1985)
programme.desc: Teenager Marty McFly travels back to the 1950s in a time machine built by his eccentric inventor friend. The return journey proves tricky enough, but he also accidentally alters the sequence of events that led to his parents falling in love - and has to persuade his future dad to win his mother's heart, or he will never be born. Sci-fi comedy adventure, starring Michael J Fox, Christopher Lloyd, Lea Thompson and Crispin Glover(n)

programme.title: Arrival (2016)
programme.desc: The world is thrown into uproar when 12 alien spaceships arrive at locations around the globe. As tensions rise between nations and fear of the arrivals grows, a recently bereaved linguist is recruited by the US army to find a way to communicate with the aliens and discover why they have come. Sci-fi drama, starring Amy Adams, Jeremy Renner and Forest Whitaker(n)

programme.title: The Watch (2012)
programme.desc: A small-town supermarket manager organises a neighbourhood watch group to patrol his community after a suspicious death, but finds the only recruits he can gather do not take the job seriously. They soon face a greater threat than crime when they uncover a secret alien invasion going on under their noses. Sci-fi comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn, Jonah Hill and Richard Ayoade(n)

programme.desc: Adam works on a new persona that he hopes will make him seem cool on his first day at high school. programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Rampant male Rothschild giraffe Meru causes problems for the giraffe herd as he relentlessly chases the females, and male clownfish Polo gets injured while fighting with the other males for the attentions of dominant female Rosie. programme.desc: Grandfather and ex-military intelligence officer Mervyn risks returning to the launch location, while Toni is unaware that her helper has left his phone switched, on giving HQ the chance to track their every move. And with Jess and Ella's precise location revealed, and the Hunters only five minutes away, are the couple about to be caught?(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Reece, a 26-year-old semi-professional footballer, is worried that his height will stop him from scoring with his date - 29-year-old marketing consultant Ria. Cameras also follow funeral director and mortician Byron who meets 34-year-old meets Lexi, an Ann Summers party planner. Other daters include bartender Rosco, who has a liaison with stunning 28-year-old, Helen(n)

programme.title: Jamie and Jimmy's Friday Night Feast
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver and Jimmy Doherty present their first all-vegan menu, joined in the cafe by comedian Romesh Ranganathan. Jamie creates an alternative lasagne for Romesh, and Jimmy's creative skills are put to good use when he builds a cold press to help a 16-year-old DIY enthusiast who wants to find a solution to fallen apples. The boys also visit the world's first fully vegan football stadium(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel treats a Labrador suffering with severe arthritis in its elbow, and suggests using stem cells to help with the inflammation, while one of the team's senior neurologists deals with a Chihuahua born with fluid on the brain. Plus, a man comes all the way from France with his Labrador cross, which requires high-end surgery for elbow dysplasia(n)

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Great Dane comes to the clinic needing an operation on its spine, but when Noel Fitzpatrick discovers the dog has laryngeal paralysis, the prospect of surgery suddenly becomes much more complicated. There are also two Labradors in for treatment. One needs a knee replacement, while the other has a leg tumour that may require amputation. But there may be bad news(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: It is the final day and the B&B owners meet for the last time to settle some scores. Jenny and Johnny want to get to the bottom of the stain on Kelly and Serena's stay(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit a Yorkshire textile mill, where Simon repurposes a mill trolley into a coffee table and Henry struggles to repair a Soviet-era motorbike(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur cooks in East Dorset compete to host the perfect dinner party, beginning with decorator Gary D Allen, who aims to give his guests a flavour of the Caribbean in his caravan. Also taking part are well-to-do singleton Pauline Elliot, down-to-earth Natalie Lawrence and local farmer Philip Palmer, who believes he is destined to win the £1,000 prize(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gym instructor Salvo Riggi competes against personal assistant Brenda Gobine, dog lover Zed Kiazim and fancy-dress enthusiast Amanda Hull as the dinner-party challenge heads to east London. The first night gets off to a shaky start when one guest insults a fellow diner's outfit, and the rest of the week features a menu themed around aphrodisiacs, a 7ft-tall butler and an argument that ends with one person's dinner going in the bin(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In South Yorkshire, chatty couple Kealey and Nathan begin with an international-themed menu. However, when well-to-do Graham and wife Sarah discover they're doing exactly the same dessert, the cheesecake war is on. Later, the youngsters of the group, Alex and Emily, offer up some European culinary delights(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Lowell Hawthorne, President and CEO of Caribbean food producers Golden Krust, dons a disguise to go undercover among the workforce in his own company. Lowell has ambitious plans for expansion and takes the opportunity to work alongside a cashier, two chefs and a forklift operator to determine the state of the business(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for the Grasshopper Also in Carlstadt, New Jersey, a family-owned Irish restaurant. There, he lends a helping hand to Mitch Sandler, who has been struggling to live up to the expectations of his father-in-law since he invested heavily in the business. The chef also tries to improve the presentation of dishes emerging from the kitchen(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Frank are pressured by their wives to join Robert in one of his therapy sessions - but the three of them decide to go to the racetrack instead(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents to Thanksgiving dinner, and Raymond sees something shocking that convinces him they are getting back together. The truth, however, proves far stranger. Robert Culp and Katherine Helmond guest star(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers are both invited to join a prestigious gentlemen's club - but unfortunately there is only a single vacancy available, meaning one of them is destined for disappointment. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The shrink worries he is being stalked by an unbalanced fan after receiving strange gifts with seemingly threatening messages attached. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Charlie's Italian bistro in La Verne, southern California, where the owner's lack of business nous is putting her relatives' homes at risk, after her mother and sister put them up as collateral. programme.desc: A retired secretary has to visit her tenant in prison to retake possession of her buy-to-let flat. A Manchester mother applies to the housing charity Shelter for help because she is convinced the property she is renting is making her children ill(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The brother of a young leukaemia patient is found to be a matching bone marrow donor. House deliberately aggravates the patient's infection to help reach a diagnosis, but both boys continue to deteriorate as time runs out. Mum-of-five Rose volunteers with sister Annette at the local food bank, but neither has ever had a full-time job, while her nephew Adam is a father of four and has been on the dole for three years. programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A car bomb kills the husband of an incapacitated woman shortly before he planned to switch off her life support. Fontana and Green are drawn into a heated debate about the right to die, and find themselves faced with two suspects who both have iron-clad alibis(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A prisoner requests Hawkes' presence at his execution, and makes a confession that shocks the forensic scientist. However, just as the lethal injection is about to be administered, a guard drops dead - and a riot ensues that brings Hawkes face to face with one of his old enemies. Guest starring Harold Perrineau (Lost, Oz) and Edward Furlong (Terminator 2, American History X)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac witnesses a suspicious exchange of briefcases from his window while recuperating from an injury at home, and the strange goings-on lead to murder. The investigation unexpectedly puts him back in touch with ex-girlfriend Peyton Driscoll. An episode paying homage to Alfred Hitchcock's film Rear Window, starring Gary Sinise, with Claire Forlani(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A nurse with a social agenda is arrested on suspicion of performing illegal sterilisations on troubled teenagers without their knowledge - a policy that has resulted in the death of one patient. As McCoy and Borgia prepare their case against her, they discover former ADA Paul Robinette is planning to act for the defence(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green track down a disturbed woman who has not only murdered a young mother and stolen her five-day-old son, but also managed to convince her own husband that the baby is really theirs. As the case goes to trial, another man comes forward claiming to be the child's real father, leaving McCoy and Borgia facing a dilemma(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Four murders occur in Manhattan, all of which seem to have been committed by the same sniper. Although the shootings appear random, Briscoe and Green suspect the deaths are linked and discover a connection between one of the victims and a former marine who is an expert shot with the rifle used in the crimes. Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have their hands full investigating four homicides, including the killing of a husband by his distraught wife and the murder of a woman who had a complex relationship with two brothers. They then have to look into the abduction of an expectant mother. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Palm Springs to check on an investment and finds herself drawn into solving the murder of a property developer. She initially believes the dead man's wife is guilty of the crime, but the suspect's subsequent suicide complicates matters further. Elliott Gould guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher recounts the unusual tale of a private eye who reluctantly recruited a new partner in the form of a French poodle, which once belonged to a murder victim. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A reporter accused of causing the deaths of US soldiers in Iraq by revealing confidential information is shot and wounded in New York. The team discovers the gun belonged to one of the dead servicemen, and suspicion soon falls on a disgruntled colleague of the deceased(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called to investigate the murder of a grief counsellor who claimed he could communicate with the dead, and discover he was a conman with a host of disgruntled clients, any one of whom might have had a motive for killing him. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A day spent working on a cut-and-dried case leaves the team free to spend some time away from work, and while McGee and Delilah argue over the importance of keeping shop-talk to a minimum, DiNozzo ends up boring his dinner date with crime-solving tales. However, the agents' personal plans are all interrupted as, one-by-one, they realise errors have been made in closing their latest investigation. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers find a thumb in some rubbish while investigating a fire bombing in Little Italy. Unable to convince a witness to testify against their main suspect, they hope that identifying the thumb will provide them with some evidence. Meanwhile, Oliver helps Andy prepare her defence at Duncan's dismissal hearing. However, when Duncan produces new evidence that shifts all the blame on to Andy, Oliver must decide if he is willing to compromise his professional integrity - and his friendship with Andy - to save her career. Missy Peregrym and Gregory Smith star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The body of a girl is discovered outside a church by two children, and investigations lead the team members to believe she was killed by someone known to her. Benson and Stabler soon realise that to find the person responsible they will require the help of psychiatrist Captain Jackson (guest star Jeremy Irons). Crime drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A music student is raped at gunpoint in her apartment - but although the SVU squad is quick to make an arrest, high-profile defence attorney Bayard Ellis tries to undermine prosecution evidence and damage the victim's credibility. Drama, guest starring Sofia Vassilieva(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen goes undercover when a murder in Brighton Beach leads the team to a thriving mail-order bride business, and hopes to hunt down the killer. Elsewhere, the detectives expose a blackmail scam run by the Russian Mafia. Crime drama, guest starring Timothy Busfield and Izabella Miko(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An African immigrant working as a maid accuses an Italian diplomat of rape, but the man hires some heavyweight lawyers to discredit her story by revealing a fabricated detail on her asylum application. A fellow maid brings the woman into further disrepute, but Benson is still inclined to believe the story. Meanwhile, Stabler's future remains in doubt. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: A teenage boy is shot dead, and when the gun is recovered it turns out to be the same one used in a case from 17 years earlier - meaning Voight put away an innocent man(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Intelligence investigate an armed bank heist, which leads them to a teenage gang run by an older Fagin-like criminal. A second incident ends in tragedy for Lindsay and another detective from the robbery-homicide division tries to take over the investigation.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Fontana and Green investigate the murder of an undercover reporter who was working on a story about a violent street gang known as L-12, following a trail of clues that leads them to a frightened businessman. Realising that his evidence could be vital to cracking the case, McCoy and Borgia urge him to testify - but he refuses to co-operate for fear of reprisals against his imprisoned son(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Calling himself Grave Digger, the killer enmeshes Mac in his scheme, claiming there is a bond between them - but the team has an opportunity to foil his plan when he unwittingly reveals the identity of his next target. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A woman confesses to murdering her husband, but the evidence clears her of any wrongdoing and raises several disturbing new lines of inquiry - including the possibility that a serial killer may be stalking the city. Elsewhere, Hawkes forces Danny to concentrate on his recovery, and Flack's behaviour is called into question. Drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a truck driver is shot dead, detectives Fontana and Green learn the victim was transporting illegal immigrants across the Mexican border and suspect a member of a citizens' patrol group was responsible for his death. However, their only witness is a Hispanic woman who risks deportation if she testifies(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The bloody trail of an elusive killer leads detectives Fontana and Green to a hit-list of names all connected to the trial of jailed multiple murderer Leland Barnes. McCoy soon realises Barnes has hired someone to kill the only people who can keep him in prison - and puts his own life on the line to see that justice is done(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green question a comedian in connection with the death of his adopted child, and uncover allegations that he molested an 11-year-old boy years previously. Reopening the case, they investigate a tangled tale of greed, deceit and broken trust involving the alleged victim's parents. Starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate a spate of murders and find a recurring pattern, leading them to believe they have a serial killer on their hands. They soon find a suspect, who admits to killing 15 women - but he then puts a disconcerting spin on things by claiming his attorney knows more about the crimes than they realise(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A volunteer firefighter is found dead in a burnt-out furniture store. However, Jessica's suspicions are aroused when the post-mortem suggests he was deceased before the blaze started. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The son of a Jamaican plantation owner marries the daughter of a local voodoo priest, leading to accusations, recriminations and murder - which is just the ticket for Jessica Fletcher, who happens to be on the island at the time. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A sweatshop boss is killed in what initially appears to be a violent but fairly routine crime prompted by a workplace affair. Briscoe and Green begin their investigation by working on the assumption that they are looking for a wronged partner with a grievance - but inquiries gradually lead them to an illegal immigrant who claims the dead man had coerced his partner into acting as a surrogate mother(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Southerlyn arrest a homeless man on suspicion of killing a fellow vagrant and gather enough evidence to bring a prosecution - but a clever defence attorney tries to get him exonerated by arguing that the laws of decent society do not apply to people who live on the streets(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Following their investigation into departed agent Brody's relationship with terrorist John Russo, the FBI continues to cause trouble for the team. This time, the bureau turns its attention to a homicide case, in which Pride's friend Elvis Bertrand, a US Navy intelligence analyst, has been labelled the prime suspect. Determined to keep the matter within the Navy, Pride and his colleagues manage to get hold of crucial evidence, forcing the FBI to work with them(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When young investment banker Zoe White accuses billionaire client Eli Colton of rape, a past 'victim' of Eli's is discovered, though her payoff included a nondisclosure agreement. Zoe gets cold feet just before trial when she is made an offer she struggles to refuse - a job in Europe with a salary of $5million. However, Benson is deternined to see justice done(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson, Fin and new detective Nick Amaro delve into the history of a respected basketball player accused of sexual abuse. Starring Dan Lauria and Mehcad Brooks(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An emotionally disturbed man claims to have witnessed a rape in a hospital. Despite the witness's dubious credibility the SVU investigates, but the alleged victim denies being assaulted. Crime drama, guest starring Natasha Lyonne and Carrie Preston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and the team try to determine whether a pregnant 13-year-old girl was raped, following a trail of clues that leads to the son of a high-profile political couple. Unfortunately, the case is complicated by the revelation of a long-held secret - and the disappearance of a family member. Guest starring Kyle MacLachlan and Paige Turco(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amanda Rollins links an attack on a woman to an unsolved case involving a serial rapist, but Benson and Amaro believe the main suspect is innocent - even though DNA evidence ties him to all the assaults. Guest starring TR Knight, with Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: When an online video shows a man being burned alive, the investigation shows the victim to have been accused of statutory rape - leading the team to believe a vigilante is at work(n)

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: Lindsay's disciplinary hearing is interrupted by a call from her distressed mother to say her boyfriend has been shot dead. However, when it turns out her parent knows more about the crime than was at first believed, Lindsay faces a huge dilemma(n)

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A nurse with a social agenda is arrested on suspicion of performing illegal sterilisations on troubled teenagers without their knowledge - a policy that has resulted in the death of one patient. As McCoy and Borgia prepare their case against her, they discover former ADA Paul Robinette is planning to act for the defence(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to help a seriously injured and traumatised woman remember the events that led to the fatal shooting of her street dancer boyfriend in their hotel room. Mac pursues a lead suggesting the victim was killed by a rival artist - but Hawkes makes a breakthrough in the lab that indicates he was targeted by someone he should have been able to trust. Gary Sinise stars(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man falls from a bridge in what appears to be a straightforward suicide, but lab results reveal he was shot in the chest before being thrown off. Hawkes dives into the Hudson River to search for the murder weapon, and discovers an antique that reveals the 'Compass killer' has returned and claimed his third victim. Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The facially scarred daughter of Lieutenant Van Buren's college friend is found dead, putting Fontana and Green on the trail of the assailant who had thrown acid in the victim's face months earlier. Meanwhile, ADA McCoy's prosecution is complicated by Van Buren's desperation(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is mysteriously killed after desecrating a treasured edition of the Hebrew Torah, brought from Poland to America. Detectives follow the trail to a man who confesses to the murder, but explains that his cousin paid the victim to defile the book. As ADA McCoy probes the family feud, he learns it may be linked to a lucrative property sale. Crime drama, with Sam Waterston, Allan Miller, Zach Grenier and Mark Feuerstein(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to investigate the murder of a notorious bounty hunter. Piecing together his final movements, they turn their attentions to a meeting between the victim and an ambitious journalist, which may be able to shed light on what happened(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A vial containing a sample of the Sars virus is stolen during a carjacking, leaving Briscoe and Green spearheading a wide-scale hunt for a man dubbed patient zero - the first victim to have contracted the illness. They finally home in on a female reporter who recently ended a long-term relationship with a virologist(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits the opera and finds that, amid the hysteria and emotion of the singing world, a murder has taken place that appears at first to be a case of self-defence. A world-famous tenor faces a battle to clear his name. Angela Lansbury and Keith Michell star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself in the middle of a wealthy family squabbling over the inheritance of a multi-millionaire, and spends the weekend at his isolated island retreat. As the arguments show no signs of abating, her host begins to fear for his life. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a bookmaker whose testimony led to the incarceration of a Mob boss 10 years previously. The trail leads to an apparently reputable businessman with a sideline in contract killing who appears to be taking orders from the Mafia. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a motivational speaker who died after being pushed from a hotel balcony, and find themselves caught up in a protest against gay adoption laws. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. The victim was discovered clutching a rifle, and it seems he had been engaged in a fire-fight, but when the agents fire the weapon, they discover it is a tranquilliser gun. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Brothers Miles and Dylan fear their craft beer enterprise is being sabotaged, after they arrive at their premises to find their latest batch swirling down the drain. Angie and Matt talk to the woman behind Girl on a Bike, the previous Golden Tap winner, three years in a row. She admits she didn't think the boys deserved the accolade, but she was too busy accepting an offer from the mighty Laughlin Brewers to twist the knife on her rivals. Laughlin are known for their aggressive approach, and it seems they had their eye on Wayward Wally too. Comedy, starring Jason Priestley and Cindy Sampson(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a Romany boy proves difficult because of his community's distrust of outsiders. When detectives identify a neighbour as the prime suspect, it causes much distress within the close-knit group(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro's friend reports that his 14-year-old daughter is missing, and the detectives learn she is working as a prostitute - so they set up a sting operation to catch the pimp, and also arrest an ageing American football player. Crimed drama, starring Danny Pino and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the rape of an actress on stage during an interactive theatre production, only to discover the people in the audience - including her assailant - were all wearing masks. With no other leads, they are forced to track down an obsessive fan of the victim, who filmed the crime. Starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: A couple enlist the help of Catherine Gee to find their ideal home in north Wales on a budget of £750,000(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping Feature. Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts visit a cottage in Torpoint, Cornwall, a former care home in Rochester, Kent, and a disused sweet shop in Porthcawl, Bridgend, before finding out who bought them and what they sold for at auction(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Developers Lucy Alexander and Martin Roberts explore a mid-terrace house in Derby, a flat in Surrey and a two-bedroom cottage in Burnley, Lancashire. The buyers also discuss their plans for the properties(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Veteran comedians Barry Cryer and Bernard Cribbins take on the antiques-hunting challenge. Travelling in classic cars and accompanied by experts Charles Hanson and Will Axon, the comics head through Hertfordshire towards auction in London. En route Barry visits the Museum of Comedy and Bernard takes a walk down memory lane when he is reminded of his time on National Service with the Parachute Regiment(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary in which Angela Rippon and Dr Chris van Tulleken investigate the latest experiments and research that could help put the brakes on the ageing process. The first programme focuses on the physical aspects, revealing how much is down to how people live their lives and how people's lifestyle choices can help combat the effects of ageing. Chris finds out how public attitudes to the elderly can have a negative impact, spending a day as an 80-year-old with the help of Hollywood-style prosthetics, and Angela visits a study in Germany comparing the benefits of dancing with conventional gym exercises(n)

programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show.
